## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project coding standards
- [ ] I have run `pnpm lint` and `pnpm type-check` with no errors
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] I have run `pnpm test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have added i18n translations for any user-facing text
- [ ] I have added SEO metadata (if adding a new page)
- [ ] I have verified accessibility (keyboard nav, screen reader, contrast)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
